action_mappings.assign_funding_rail: assign payment case {} to funding rail option {}
action_mappings.release_funding_rail: release payment case {} from funding rail option {}
action_mappings.reserve_immediate_channel: reserve immediate payment channel {} for payment case {}
action_mappings.release_immediate_channel: release immediate payment channel {} from payment case {}
action_mappings.select_immediate_channel: select immediate payment channel {} for payment case {}
action_mappings.select_non_instant_switch: select non instant switch service {} for payment case {}
action_mappings.authenticate_channel: authenticate immediate payment channel {} for payment case {} using authentication credential {}
action_mappings.authenticate_for_settlement_window: authenticate payment case {} for settlement window {}
action_mappings.reserve_payer_account: reserve payer funding account {} for payment case {}
action_mappings.release_payer_account: release payer funding account {} from payment case {}
action_mappings.reserve_beneficiary_endpoint: reserve beneficiary endpoint {} for payment case {}
action_mappings.release_beneficiary_endpoint: release beneficiary endpoint {} from payment case {}
action_mappings.reserve_correspondent_bank: reserve correspondent bank {} for payment case {}
action_mappings.release_correspondent_bank: release correspondent bank {} from payment case {}
action_mappings.reserve_alternative_network: reserve alternative network {} for payment case {}
action_mappings.release_alternative_network: release alternative network {} from payment case {}
action_mappings.allocate_settlement_rail: allocate settlement rail option {} for payment case {} using payer funding account {} and beneficiary endpoint {}
action_mappings.allocate_settlement_with_correspondent: allocate settlement rail option {} for payment case {} using correspondent bank {} and liquidity reserve token {}
action_mappings.clear_additional_checks: clear additional checks for payment case {} using payer funding account {} and beneficiary endpoint {}
action_mappings.approve_routing_policy: approve routing policy for payment case {} using payer funding account {}, beneficiary endpoint {}, and timeout profile {}
action_mappings.approve_routing_policy_with_retry: approve routing policy with retry for payment case {} using correspondent bank {}, alternative network {}, and retry policy {}
action_mappings.commit_execution_ready: commit execution ready for payment case {} using payer funding account {} and beneficiary endpoint {}
action_mappings.authenticate_and_prepare_channel: authenticate and prepare immediate payment channel {} for payment case {} using authentication credential {}
action_mappings.mark_execution_authorized_for_channel: mark execution authorized for payment case {} using immediate payment channel {}
action_mappings.mark_execution_authorized_for_switch: mark execution authorized for payment case {} using non instant switch service {}
action_mappings.schedule_case_for_window: schedule payment case {} for settlement window {}
action_mappings.bind_window_for_beneficiary_and_origin: bind beneficiary case {} and originating case {} to settlement window {}
action_mappings.confirm_external_execution: confirm external execution for payment case {} using immediate channel {} with authentication credential {}
action_mappings.finalize_settlement_with_window: finalize settlement for payment case {} with settlement window {}
action_mappings.finalize_settlement_with_confirmation: finalize settlement for payment case {} with external confirmation

action_mappings_indef.assign_funding_rail: assign a payment case {} to a funding rail option {}
action_mappings_indef.release_funding_rail: release a payment case {} from a funding rail option {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_immediate_channel: reserve an immediate payment channel {} for a payment case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_immediate_channel: release an immediate payment channel {} from a payment case {}
action_mappings_indef.select_immediate_channel: select an immediate payment channel {} for a payment case {}
action_mappings_indef.select_non_instant_switch: select a non instant switch service {} for a payment case {}
action_mappings_indef.authenticate_channel: authenticate an immediate payment channel {} for a payment case {} using an authentication credential {}
action_mappings_indef.authenticate_for_settlement_window: authenticate a payment case {} for a settlement window {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_payer_account: reserve a payer funding account {} for a payment case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_payer_account: release a payer funding account {} from a payment case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_beneficiary_endpoint: reserve a beneficiary endpoint {} for a payment case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_beneficiary_endpoint: release a beneficiary endpoint {} from a payment case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_correspondent_bank: reserve a correspondent bank {} for a payment case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_correspondent_bank: release a correspondent bank {} from a payment case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_alternative_network: reserve an alternative network {} for a payment case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_alternative_network: release an alternative network {} from a payment case {}
action_mappings_indef.allocate_settlement_rail: allocate a settlement rail option {} for a payment case {} using a payer funding account {} and a beneficiary endpoint {}
action_mappings_indef.allocate_settlement_with_correspondent: allocate a settlement rail option {} for a payment case {} using a correspondent bank {} and a liquidity reserve token {}
action_mappings_indef.clear_additional_checks: clear additional checks for a payment case {} using a payer funding account {} and a beneficiary endpoint {}
action_mappings_indef.approve_routing_policy: approve routing policy for a payment case {} using a payer funding account {}, a beneficiary endpoint {}, and a timeout profile {}
action_mappings_indef.approve_routing_policy_with_retry: approve routing policy with retry for a payment case {} using a correspondent bank {}, an alternative network {}, and a retry policy {}
action_mappings_indef.commit_execution_ready: commit execution ready for a payment case {} using a payer funding account {} and a beneficiary endpoint {}
action_mappings_indef.authenticate_and_prepare_channel: authenticate and prepare an immediate payment channel {} for a payment case {} using an authentication credential {}
action_mappings_indef.mark_execution_authorized_for_channel: mark execution authorized for a payment case {} using an immediate payment channel {}
action_mappings_indef.mark_execution_authorized_for_switch: mark execution authorized for a payment case {} using a non instant switch service {}

action_mappings_indef.bind_window_for_beneficiary_and_origin: bind a beneficiary case {} and an originating case {} to a settlement window {}

action_mappings_indef.finalize_settlement_with_confirmation: finalize settlement for a payment case {} with external confirmation

predicate_mappings.payer_account_reserved: the payer account {} is reserved for {}
predicate_mappings.beneficiary_endpoint_reserved: the beneficiary endpoint {} is reserved for {}
predicate_mappings.correspondent_reserved: the correspondent bank {} is reserved for {}
predicate_mappings.alternative_network_reserved: the alternative network {} is reserved for {}
predicate_mappings.settlement_rail_committed: the settlement rail {} is committed for {}
predicate_mappings.window_eligible: {} is eligible for the settlement window {}
predicate_mappings.window_bound: {} is bound to the settlement window {}
predicate_mappings.external_confirmation_received: external confirmation has been received for {}
predicate_mappings.payer_account_compatible: payer account is compatible for {} with {}
predicate_mappings.beneficiary_endpoint_compatible: beneficiary endpoint is compatible for {} with {}
predicate_mappings.correspondent_compatible: correspondent bank is compatible for {} with {}
predicate_mappings.liquidity_reserve_compatible: liquidity reserve is compatible for {} with {}
predicate_mappings.alternative_network_compatible: alternative network is compatible for {} with {}
predicate_mappings.routing_policy_association: {} is associated with the routing policy bucket {}
predicate_mappings.window_scheduled: {} is scheduled for the settlement window {}
predicate_mappings.immediate_channel_assigned: {} is assigned to {} as the immediate channel

preconditions: I can only register a payment case A if it is not the case that A is registered and it is not the case that A is settlement committed
effects: Once I register a payment case A, it is the case that A is registered

assign_funding_rail.description: assign a payment case A to a funding rail option B
preconditions: I can only assign a payment case A to a funding rail option B if it is the case that A is registered and funding rail is available for B and funding is compatible for A with B
I can only assign a payment case A to a funding rail option B if it is not the case that funding is reserved for A
effects: Once I assign a payment case A to a funding rail option B, it is the case that A is assigned to funding rail B and funding is reserved for A
Once I assign a payment case A to a funding rail option B, it is not the case anymore that funding rail is available for B

release_funding_rail.description: release a payment case A from a funding rail option B
preconditions: I can only release a payment case A from a funding rail option B if it is the case that A is assigned to funding rail B
I can only release a payment case A from a funding rail option B if it is not the case that A is settlement allocated and it is not the case that A is policy approved
effects: Once I release a payment case A from a funding rail option B, it is the case that funding rail is available for B

Once I release a payment case A from a funding rail option B, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to funding rail B and it is not the case anymore that funding is reserved for A and it is not the case anymore that the channel is selected for A and it is not the case anymore that the channel is authenticated for A and it is not the case anymore that A is fallback marked and it is not the case anymore that A is execution committed and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional settlement checks

reserve_immediate_channel.description: reserve an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A if it is the case that A is registered and immediate channel is available for B
effects: Once I reserve an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A, it is the case that B is assigned to A as the immediate channel
Once I reserve an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A, it is not the case anymore that immediate channel is available for B

release_immediate_channel.description: release an immediate payment channel B from a payment case A
preconditions: I can only release an immediate payment channel B from a payment case A if it is the case that B is assigned to A as the immediate channel
effects: Once I release an immediate payment channel B from a payment case A, it is the case that immediate channel is available for B
Once I release an immediate payment channel B from a payment case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to A as the immediate channel

select_immediate_channel.description: select an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A
preconditions: I can only select an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A if it is the case that A is registered and funding is reserved for A and B is assigned to A as the immediate channel
I can only select an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A if it is not the case that the channel is selected for A
effects: Once I select an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A, it is the case that the channel is selected for A

select_non_instant_switch.description: select a non instant switch service B for a payment case A
preconditions: I can only select a non instant switch service B for a payment case A if it is the case that A is registered and funding is reserved for A and non instant switch is available for B
I can only select a non instant switch service B for a payment case A if it is not the case that the channel is selected for A
effects: Once I select a non instant switch service B for a payment case A, it is the case that the channel is selected for A and A is fallback marked
Once I select a non instant switch service B for a payment case A, it is not the case anymore that non instant switch is available for B

authenticate_channel.description: authenticate an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A using an authentication credential C
preconditions: I can only authenticate an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A using an authentication credential C if it is the case that the channel is selected for A and funding is reserved for A and B is assigned to A as the immediate channel and authentication credential is available for C
I can only authenticate an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A using an authentication credential C if it is not the case that the channel is authenticated for A
effects: Once I authenticate an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A using an authentication credential C, it is the case that the channel is authenticated for A
Once I authenticate an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A using an authentication credential C, it is not the case anymore that A is fallback marked

authenticate_for_settlement_window.description: authenticate a payment case A for a settlement window B
preconditions: I can only authenticate a payment case A for a settlement window B if it is the case that funding is reserved for A and A is bound to the settlement window B
I can only authenticate a payment case A for a settlement window B if it is not the case that the channel is authenticated for A
effects: Once I authenticate a payment case A for a settlement window B, it is the case that the channel is authenticated for A
Once I authenticate a payment case A for a settlement window B, it is not the case anymore that A is fallback marked

reserve_payer_account.description: reserve a payer funding account B for a payment case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a payer funding account B for a payment case A if it is the case that A is registered and payer account is available for B and payer account is compatible for A with B
effects: Once I reserve a payer funding account B for a payment case A, it is the case that the payer account B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a payer funding account B for a payment case A, it is not the case anymore that payer account is available for B

release_payer_account.description: release a payer funding account B from a payment case A
preconditions: I can only release a payer funding account B from a payment case A if it is the case that the payer account B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a payer funding account B from a payment case A, it is the case that payer account is available for B
Once I release a payer funding account B from a payment case A, it is not the case anymore that the payer account B is reserved for A

reserve_beneficiary_endpoint.description: reserve a beneficiary endpoint B for a payment case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a beneficiary endpoint B for a payment case A if it is the case that A is registered and beneficiary endpoint is available for B and beneficiary endpoint is compatible for A with B
effects: Once I reserve a beneficiary endpoint B for a payment case A, it is the case that the beneficiary endpoint B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a beneficiary endpoint B for a payment case A, it is not the case anymore that beneficiary endpoint is available for B

release_beneficiary_endpoint.description: release a beneficiary endpoint B from a payment case A
preconditions: I can only release a beneficiary endpoint B from a payment case A if it is the case that the beneficiary endpoint B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a beneficiary endpoint B from a payment case A, it is the case that beneficiary endpoint is available for B
Once I release a beneficiary endpoint B from a payment case A, it is not the case anymore that the beneficiary endpoint B is reserved for A

reserve_correspondent_bank.description: reserve a correspondent bank B for a payment case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a correspondent bank B for a payment case A if it is the case that A is registered and correspondent is available for B and correspondent bank is compatible for A with B
effects: Once I reserve a correspondent bank B for a payment case A, it is the case that the correspondent bank B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a correspondent bank B for a payment case A, it is not the case anymore that correspondent is available for B

release_correspondent_bank.description: release a correspondent bank B from a payment case A
preconditions: I can only release a correspondent bank B from a payment case A if it is the case that the correspondent bank B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a correspondent bank B from a payment case A, it is the case that correspondent is available for B
Once I release a correspondent bank B from a payment case A, it is not the case anymore that the correspondent bank B is reserved for A

reserve_alternative_network.description: reserve an alternative network B for a payment case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an alternative network B for a payment case A if it is the case that A is registered and alternative network is available for B and alternative network is compatible for A with B
effects: Once I reserve an alternative network B for a payment case A, it is the case that the alternative network B is reserved for A
Once I reserve an alternative network B for a payment case A, it is not the case anymore that alternative network is available for B

release_alternative_network.description: release an alternative network B from a payment case A
preconditions: I can only release an alternative network B from a payment case A if it is the case that the alternative network B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release an alternative network B from a payment case A, it is the case that alternative network is available for B
Once I release an alternative network B from a payment case A, it is not the case anymore that the alternative network B is reserved for A

allocate_settlement_rail.description: allocate a settlement rail option B for a payment case A using a payer funding account C and a beneficiary endpoint D
preconditions: I can only allocate a settlement rail option B for a payment case A using a payer funding account C and a beneficiary endpoint D if it is the case that funding is reserved for A and the payer account C is reserved for A and the beneficiary endpoint D is reserved for A and settlement rail is available for B and settlement is compatible for A with B
I can only allocate a settlement rail option B for a payment case A using a payer funding account C and a beneficiary endpoint D if it is not the case that A is settlement allocated
effects: Once I allocate a settlement rail option B for a payment case A using a payer funding account C and a beneficiary endpoint D, it is the case that the settlement rail B is committed for A and A is settlement allocated
Once I allocate a settlement rail option B for a payment case A using a payer funding account C and a beneficiary endpoint D, it is not the case anymore that settlement rail is available for B

allocate_settlement_with_correspondent.description: allocate a settlement rail option B for a payment case A using a correspondent bank C and a liquidity reserve token D
preconditions: I can only allocate a settlement rail option B for a payment case A using a correspondent bank C and a liquidity reserve token D if it is the case that funding is reserved for A and the correspondent bank C is reserved for A and liquidity reserve is available for D and settlement rail is available for B and settlement is compatible for A with B and liquidity reserve is compatible for A with D
I can only allocate a settlement rail option B for a payment case A using a correspondent bank C and a liquidity reserve token D if it is not the case that A is settlement allocated
effects: Once I allocate a settlement rail option B for a payment case A using a correspondent bank C and a liquidity reserve token D, it is the case that the settlement rail B is committed for A and A is settlement allocated and A requires additional settlement checks and A is fallback marked

Once I allocate a settlement rail option B for a payment case A using a correspondent bank C and a liquidity reserve token D, it is not the case anymore that settlement rail is available for B and it is not the case anymore that liquidity reserve is available for D

clear_additional_checks.description: clear additional checks for a payment case A using a payer funding account B and a beneficiary endpoint C
preconditions: I can only clear additional checks for a payment case A using a payer funding account B and a beneficiary endpoint C if it is the case that A is settlement allocated and A requires additional settlement checks and the payer account B is reserved for A and the beneficiary endpoint C is reserved for A
effects: Once I clear additional checks for a payment case A using a payer funding account B and a beneficiary endpoint C, it is not the case anymore that A requires additional settlement checks and it is not the case anymore that A is fallback marked

approve_routing_policy.description: approve routing policy for a payment case A using a payer funding account B, a beneficiary endpoint C, and a timeout profile D
preconditions: I can only approve routing policy for a payment case A using a payer funding account B, a beneficiary endpoint C, and a timeout profile D if it is the case that the channel is authenticated for A and A is settlement allocated and the payer account B is reserved for A and the beneficiary endpoint C is reserved for A and A is associated with the routing policy bucket D

I can only approve routing policy for a payment case A using a payer funding account B, a beneficiary endpoint C, and a timeout profile D if it is not the case that A is fallback marked and it is not the case that A is policy approved
effects: Once I approve routing policy for a payment case A using a payer funding account B, a beneficiary endpoint C, and a timeout profile D, it is the case that A is policy approved

approve_routing_policy_with_retry.description: approve routing policy with retry for a payment case A using a correspondent bank B, an alternative network C, and a retry policy D
preconditions: I can only approve routing policy with retry for a payment case A using a correspondent bank B, an alternative network C, and a retry policy D if it is the case that the channel is authenticated for A and A is settlement allocated and the correspondent bank B is reserved for A and the alternative network C is reserved for A and A is associated with the routing policy bucket D
I can only approve routing policy with retry for a payment case A using a correspondent bank B, an alternative network C, and a retry policy D if it is not the case that A is policy approved
effects: Once I approve routing policy with retry for a payment case A using a correspondent bank B, an alternative network C, and a retry policy D, it is the case that A is policy approved and A is fallback marked

commit_execution_ready.description: commit execution ready for a payment case A using a payer funding account B and a beneficiary endpoint C
preconditions: I can only commit execution ready for a payment case A using a payer funding account B and a beneficiary endpoint C if it is the case that A is policy approved and A is fallback marked and the payer account B is reserved for A and the beneficiary endpoint C is reserved for A
effects: Once I commit execution ready for a payment case A using a payer funding account B and a beneficiary endpoint C, it is the case that A is execution committed

Once I commit execution ready for a payment case A using a payer funding account B and a beneficiary endpoint C, it is not the case anymore that A is fallback marked and it is not the case anymore that the channel is authenticated for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional settlement checks

authenticate_and_prepare_channel.description: authenticate and prepare an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A using an authentication credential C
preconditions: I can only authenticate and prepare an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A using an authentication credential C if it is the case that A is execution committed and A is policy approved and funding is reserved for A and B is assigned to A as the immediate channel and authentication credential is available for C
I can only authenticate and prepare an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A using an authentication credential C if it is not the case that the channel is authenticated for A
effects: Once I authenticate and prepare an immediate payment channel B for a payment case A using an authentication credential C, it is the case that the channel is authenticated for A

mark_execution_authorized_for_channel.description: mark execution authorized for a payment case A using an immediate payment channel B
preconditions: I can only mark execution authorized for a payment case A using an immediate payment channel B if it is the case that A is policy approved and the channel is authenticated for A and B is assigned to A as the immediate channel
I can only mark execution authorized for a payment case A using an immediate payment channel B if it is not the case that A is fallback marked and it is not the case that A is execution authorized
effects: Once I mark execution authorized for a payment case A using an immediate payment channel B, it is the case that A is execution authorized

mark_execution_authorized_for_switch.description: mark execution authorized for a payment case A using a non instant switch service B
preconditions: I can only mark execution authorized for a payment case A using a non instant switch service B if it is the case that A is policy approved and the channel is authenticated for A and non instant switch is available for B
I can only mark execution authorized for a payment case A using a non instant switch service B if it is not the case that A is fallback marked and it is not the case that A is execution authorized
effects: Once I mark execution authorized for a payment case A using a non instant switch service B, it is the case that A is execution authorized
Once I mark execution authorized for a payment case A using a non instant switch service B, it is not the case anymore that non instant switch is available for B

schedule_case_for_window.description: schedule a payment case A for a settlement window B
preconditions: I can only schedule a payment case A for a settlement window B if it is the case that A is execution authorized and settlement window is available for B and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I schedule a payment case A for a settlement window B, it is the case that A is scheduled for the settlement window B
Once I schedule a payment case A for a settlement window B, it is not the case anymore that settlement window is available for B

bind_window_for_beneficiary_and_origin.description: bind a beneficiary case A and an originating case B to a settlement window C
preconditions: I can only bind a beneficiary case A and an originating case B to a settlement window C if it is the case that A is registered and A is a beneficiary case and A is eligible for the settlement window C and B is scheduled for the settlement window C
I can only bind a beneficiary case A and an originating case B to a settlement window C if it is not the case that A is bound to the settlement window C
effects: Once I bind a beneficiary case A and an originating case B to a settlement window C, it is the case that A is bound to the settlement window C

confirm_external_execution.description: confirm external execution for a payment case A using an immediate channel B with an authentication credential C
preconditions: I can only confirm external execution for a payment case A using an immediate channel B with an authentication credential C if it is the case that A is registered and A is a beneficiary case and the channel is authenticated for A and A is execution authorized and B is assigned to A as the immediate channel and authentication credential is available for C
I can only confirm external execution for a payment case A using an immediate channel B with an authentication credential C if it is not the case that external confirmation has been received for A
effects: Once I confirm external execution for a payment case A using an immediate channel B with an authentication credential C, it is the case that external confirmation has been received for A

finalize_settlement_for_case.description: finalize settlement for a payment case A
preconditions: I can only finalize settlement for a payment case A if it is the case that A is an originating case and A is registered and funding is reserved for A and A is settlement allocated and A is policy approved and A is execution authorized and the channel is authenticated for A
I can only finalize settlement for a payment case A if it is not the case that A is settlement committed
effects: Once I finalize settlement for a payment case A, it is the case that A is settlement committed

finalize_settlement_with_window.description: finalize settlement for a payment case A with a settlement window B
preconditions: I can only finalize settlement for a payment case A with a settlement window B if it is the case that A is a beneficiary case and A is registered and funding is reserved for A and A is settlement allocated and A is policy approved and A is execution authorized and the channel is authenticated for A and A is bound to the settlement window B
I can only finalize settlement for a payment case A with a settlement window B if it is not the case that A is settlement committed
effects: Once I finalize settlement for a payment case A with a settlement window B, it is the case that A is settlement committed

finalize_settlement_with_confirmation.description: finalize settlement for a payment case A with external confirmation
preconditions: I can only finalize settlement for a payment case A with external confirmation if it is the case that A is a beneficiary case and A is registered and funding is reserved for A and A is settlement allocated and A is policy approved and A is execution authorized and the channel is authenticated for A and external confirmation has been received for A
I can only finalize settlement for a payment case A with external confirmation if it is not the case that A is settlement committed
effects: Once I finalize settlement for a payment case A with external confirmation, it is the case that A is settlement committed

action_nl_templates.assign_funding_rail: assign payment case {?payment_case} to funding rail option {?funding_rail}
action_nl_templates.release_funding_rail: release payment case {?payment_case} from funding rail option {?funding_rail}
action_nl_templates.reserve_immediate_channel: reserve immediate payment channel {?immediate_channel} for payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates.release_immediate_channel: release immediate payment channel {?immediate_channel} from payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates.select_immediate_channel: select immediate payment channel {?immediate_channel} for payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates.select_non_instant_switch: select non instant switch service {?non_instant_switch} for payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates.authenticate_channel: authenticate immediate payment channel {?immediate_channel} for payment case {?payment_case} using authentication credential {?credential}
action_nl_templates.authenticate_for_settlement_window: authenticate payment case {?payment_case} for settlement window {?settlement_window}
action_nl_templates.reserve_payer_account: reserve payer funding account {?payer_account} for payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates.release_payer_account: release payer funding account {?payer_account} from payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_beneficiary_endpoint: reserve beneficiary endpoint {?beneficiary_endpoint} for payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates.release_beneficiary_endpoint: release beneficiary endpoint {?beneficiary_endpoint} from payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_correspondent_bank: reserve correspondent bank {?correspondent_bank} for payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates.release_correspondent_bank: release correspondent bank {?correspondent_bank} from payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_alternative_network: reserve alternative network {?alternative_network} for payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates.release_alternative_network: release alternative network {?alternative_network} from payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates.allocate_settlement_rail: allocate settlement rail option {?settlement_rail} for payment case {?payment_case} using payer funding account {?payer_account} and beneficiary endpoint {?beneficiary_endpoint}
action_nl_templates.allocate_settlement_with_correspondent: allocate settlement rail option {?settlement_rail} for payment case {?payment_case} using correspondent bank {?correspondent_bank} and liquidity reserve token {?liquidity_reserve}
action_nl_templates.clear_additional_checks: clear additional checks for payment case {?payment_case} using payer funding account {?payer_account} and beneficiary endpoint {?beneficiary_endpoint}
action_nl_templates.approve_routing_policy: approve routing policy for payment case {?payment_case} using payer funding account {?payer_account}, beneficiary endpoint {?beneficiary_endpoint}, and timeout profile {?timeout_profile}
action_nl_templates.approve_routing_policy_with_retry: approve routing policy with retry for payment case {?payment_case} using correspondent bank {?correspondent_bank}, alternative network {?alternative_network}, and retry policy {?retry_policy}
action_nl_templates.commit_execution_ready: commit execution ready for payment case {?payment_case} using payer funding account {?payer_account} and beneficiary endpoint {?beneficiary_endpoint}
action_nl_templates.authenticate_and_prepare_channel: authenticate and prepare immediate payment channel {?immediate_channel} for payment case {?payment_case} using authentication credential {?credential}
action_nl_templates.mark_execution_authorized_for_channel: mark execution authorized for payment case {?payment_case} using immediate payment channel {?immediate_channel}
action_nl_templates.mark_execution_authorized_for_switch: mark execution authorized for payment case {?payment_case} using non instant switch service {?non_instant_switch}
action_nl_templates.schedule_case_for_window: schedule payment case {?payment_case} for settlement window {?settlement_window}
action_nl_templates.bind_window_for_beneficiary_and_origin: bind beneficiary case {?beneficiary_case} and originating case {?originating_case} to settlement window {?settlement_window}
action_nl_templates.confirm_external_execution: confirm external execution for payment case {?payment_case} using immediate channel {?immediate_channel} with authentication credential {?credential}
action_nl_templates.finalize_settlement_with_window: finalize settlement for payment case {?payment_case} with settlement window {?settlement_window}
action_nl_templates.finalize_settlement_with_confirmation: finalize settlement for payment case {?payment_case} with external confirmation

predicate_nl_templates.payer_account_reserved: the payer account {?payer_account} is reserved for {?payment_case}
predicate_nl_templates.beneficiary_endpoint_reserved: the beneficiary endpoint {?beneficiary_endpoint} is reserved for {?payment_case}
predicate_nl_templates.correspondent_reserved: the correspondent bank {?correspondent_bank} is reserved for {?payment_case}
predicate_nl_templates.alternative_network_reserved: the alternative network {?alternative_network} is reserved for {?payment_case}
predicate_nl_templates.settlement_rail_committed: the settlement rail {?settlement_rail} is committed for {?payment_case}
predicate_nl_templates.window_eligible: {?payment_case} is eligible for the settlement window {?settlement_window}
predicate_nl_templates.window_bound: {?payment_case} is bound to the settlement window {?settlement_window}
predicate_nl_templates.external_confirmation_received: external confirmation has been received for {?payment_case}
predicate_nl_templates.payer_account_compatible: payer account is compatible for {?payment_case} with {?payer_account}
predicate_nl_templates.beneficiary_endpoint_compatible: beneficiary endpoint is compatible for {?payment_case} with {?beneficiary_endpoint}
predicate_nl_templates.correspondent_compatible: correspondent bank is compatible for {?payment_case} with {?correspondent_bank}
predicate_nl_templates.liquidity_reserve_compatible: liquidity reserve is compatible for {?payment_case} with {?liquidity_reserve}
predicate_nl_templates.alternative_network_compatible: alternative network is compatible for {?payment_case} with {?alternative_network}
predicate_nl_templates.routing_policy_association: {?payment_case} is associated with the routing policy bucket {?routing_policy_bucket}
predicate_nl_templates.window_scheduled: {?payment_case} is scheduled for the settlement window {?settlement_window}
predicate_nl_templates.immediate_channel_assigned: {?immediate_channel} is assigned to {?payment_case} as the immediate channel

action_nl_templates_indef.assign_funding_rail: assign a payment case {?payment_case} to a funding rail option {?funding_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_funding_rail: release a payment case {?payment_case} from a funding rail option {?funding_rail}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_immediate_channel: reserve an immediate payment channel {?immediate_channel} for a payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_immediate_channel: release an immediate payment channel {?immediate_channel} from a payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.select_immediate_channel: select an immediate payment channel {?immediate_channel} for a payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.select_non_instant_switch: select a non instant switch service {?non_instant_switch} for a payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.authenticate_channel: authenticate an immediate payment channel {?immediate_channel} for a payment case {?payment_case} using an authentication credential {?credential}
action_nl_templates_indef.authenticate_for_settlement_window: authenticate a payment case {?payment_case} for a settlement window {?settlement_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_payer_account: reserve a payer funding account {?payer_account} for a payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_payer_account: release a payer funding account {?payer_account} from a payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_beneficiary_endpoint: reserve a beneficiary endpoint {?beneficiary_endpoint} for a payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_beneficiary_endpoint: release a beneficiary endpoint {?beneficiary_endpoint} from a payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_correspondent_bank: reserve a correspondent bank {?correspondent_bank} for a payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_correspondent_bank: release a correspondent bank {?correspondent_bank} from a payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_alternative_network: reserve an alternative network {?alternative_network} for a payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_alternative_network: release an alternative network {?alternative_network} from a payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.allocate_settlement_rail: allocate a settlement rail option {?settlement_rail} for a payment case {?payment_case} using a payer funding account {?payer_account} and a beneficiary endpoint {?beneficiary_endpoint}
action_nl_templates_indef.allocate_settlement_with_correspondent: allocate a settlement rail option {?settlement_rail} for a payment case {?payment_case} using a correspondent bank {?correspondent_bank} and a liquidity reserve token {?liquidity_reserve}
action_nl_templates_indef.clear_additional_checks: clear additional checks for a payment case {?payment_case} using a payer funding account {?payer_account} and a beneficiary endpoint {?beneficiary_endpoint}
action_nl_templates_indef.approve_routing_policy: approve routing policy for a payment case {?payment_case} using a payer funding account {?payer_account}, a beneficiary endpoint {?beneficiary_endpoint}, and a timeout profile {?timeout_profile}
action_nl_templates_indef.approve_routing_policy_with_retry: approve routing policy with retry for a payment case {?payment_case} using a correspondent bank {?correspondent_bank}, an alternative network {?alternative_network}, and a retry policy {?retry_policy}
action_nl_templates_indef.commit_execution_ready: commit execution ready for a payment case {?payment_case} using a payer funding account {?payer_account} and a beneficiary endpoint {?beneficiary_endpoint}
action_nl_templates_indef.authenticate_and_prepare_channel: authenticate and prepare an immediate payment channel {?immediate_channel} for a payment case {?payment_case} using an authentication credential {?credential}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_execution_authorized_for_channel: mark execution authorized for a payment case {?payment_case} using an immediate payment channel {?immediate_channel}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_execution_authorized_for_switch: mark execution authorized for a payment case {?payment_case} using a non instant switch service {?non_instant_switch}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_case_for_window: schedule a payment case {?payment_case} for a settlement window {?settlement_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_window_for_beneficiary_and_origin: bind a beneficiary case {?beneficiary_case} and an originating case {?originating_case} to a settlement window {?settlement_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_external_execution: confirm external execution for a payment case {?payment_case} using an immediate channel {?immediate_channel} with an authentication credential {?credential}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_settlement_for_case: finalize settlement for a payment case {?payment_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_settlement_with_window: finalize settlement for a payment case {?payment_case} with a settlement window {?settlement_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_settlement_with_confirmation: finalize settlement for a payment case {?payment_case} with external confirmation

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a payment case or a funding rail option or a settlement rail option or a beneficiary endpoint or a payer funding account or a correspondent bank or a immediate payment channel or a non instant switch service or a settlement window or a authentication credential or a liquidity reserve token or a alternative network or a routing policy is also a object
Everything that is a timeout profile or a retry policy is also a routing policy
Everything that is a originating payment case or a beneficiary payment case is also a payment case
